name: Application Development | FAQs | openEuler
description: Get answers to frequently asked questions regarding application development on openEuler.

mainEntity.name: Why does the self-compilation of some applications that depend on java-devel fail when the rpmbuild command is executed?

acceptedAnswer.text:
openEuler provides multiple versions of OpenJDK, such as OpenJDK 1.8.0 and OpenJDK 11, to support updated OpenJDK features and be compatible with Java applications. Certain applications require the java-devel package for compilation. However, installing the java-devel package may default to java-11-openjdk, causing compilation failures. To resolve this issue, execute the following commands to install java-1.8.0-openjdk and then proceed with the rpmbuild command for self-compilation:

yum install java-1.8.0-openjdk
yum install java-1.8.0-openjdk-devel
